Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. Remove all modern
businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- gas station canopy building at center lot over pump islands, 1 story
- service station office building at rear right corner, 1 story
- open service bay building at rear left corner, 1 story
- immutable elements: canopy with four corner support posts, pump island with eight dispensers, north and south driveway aprons
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 2005
Post-9/11 era. A 2005 gas station — big multi-island canopy, card readers at every pump, LED price sign, and a convenience store doing most of the business.

PERIOD DETAILS
- stacked cases of bottled water and charcoal bags outside the store
- wide multi-island canopy with branded fascia lighting
- price sign showing gas around $2.30
Typography: clean corporate sans-serif, polished brand identities.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 7 people, spread out with empty areas.
- a customer walking out with a coffee cup
- a driver self-serving at the pump
Clothing: men in baggy jeans, trucker hats; women in trucker hats, low-rise jeans. Fashion palette: denim, pink, white. No posing or eye contact.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 3 period vehicles, all different:
- 2000-2007 Ford Taurus — rounded, aging fleet-look sedan — gold
- 2003-2008 Honda Pilot — boxy three-row SUV — white
- 2004-2008 Ford F-150 — bigger, bolder grille — gray
Parked with gaps; optionally 1 driving; no vehicle newer than 2005.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, turn arrows
- utilities: overhead power lines standard, cable and fiber lines on poles appearing

TREES
- cottonwood tree at northeast corner of lot: young tree, thin trunk
- elm tree at sidewalk edge left of entrance: very young sapling
- cedar tree at back fence line: maturing tree

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — early digital camera or Kodak/Fuji consumer film look.
Color: neutral tones. Grain: low grain, early digital noise in shadows.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
SelectedVehicles: 2000-2007 Ford Taurus — rounded, aging fleet-look sedan
